question: 请基于全年数据出一份异常审计摘要报告,覆盖五类规则并列出关键异常ID。

scope.expense_types: all expense types (差旅、培训、招待、办公、通讯等)

rule_categories.name: 发票重复报销
rule_categories.description: 同一发票最多报销1次。发现同一发票在不同报销单中重复出现的，应认定为重复报销风险。

rule_categories.name: 拆分报销规避审批
rule_categories.description: 同一员工、同一费用类型在7天内出现2笔及以上报销，且合计金额达到《授权管理办法》附件二较高审批线的，应重点核查拆分规避审批。

rule_categories.name: 超制度标准报销
rule_categories.source: 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md 第十二条 + 各费用管理办法
rule_categories.description: 无专项审批时，报销金额不得超过对应制度标准的1.0倍。

rule_categories.name: 部门预算不足报销
rule_categories.description: 部门年度预算不足时不得继续报销。预算使用达到预算额度的1.0倍后，确需发生的费用应履行专项审批。

rule_categories.name: 超期报销
rule_categories.description: 员工应在费用发生后60天内提交报销申请；超过期限的，原则上不得报销。

policy_questions: Which policy version applies? (2025 vs deprecated 2022)
What are the five rule categories and their exact clauses?
What are the standard limits for each expense type?
What are the approval thresholds per authorization attachment?
data_questions: Are there invoices used more than once?
Are there split claims (same employee, same type, within 7 days, total >= higher approval line)?
Are there expenses exceeding standards without special approval?
Are there departments exceeding their annual budget?
Are there expenses submitted more than 60 days after occurrence?
complexity_reasons: Two or more policies (at least 5 policy documents involved)
Aggregation, grouping, joins, batch filtering required
Five business rules must be covered

data_analyst.task_description: Run full-year batch analysis across all five rule categories. Query reused invoices, split claims patterns, standard-exceeding records, budget overrun departments, and delayed reimbursements. Return all anomaly IDs and record IDs with supporting evidence.

evidence_requirements: For each anomaly: specific record IDs, invoice numbers, amounts, dates, policy citations
Evidence matrix with anomaly_id, record_ids, citations, facts
Coverage of all five rule categories
stopping_conditions: All five rule categories investigated with complete data coverage
Evidence matrix passes coverage check at 100%
